title: draba daurica var. ramosa
intro: Draba daurica var. ramosa, also known as the branching draba, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba daurica var. ramosa include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function, as well as its potential to protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
